title: Ammuri Aloe Vera Gel 300ml 100% Pure Organic & Natural Soothing & Hydrating for Face, Body & Hair After Sun Care Daily Moisturiser Non-Sticky Vegan Cruelty-Free (2 x 300g ALOE-Bottles-SET)

features: BIG 300 ml VALUE SIZE – Extra-large tub of Ammuri Organic Aloe Vera Gel gives you more of the pure, plant-based care you love, making it perfect for daily use on face, body & hair.
100 % PURE & ORGANIC – Made from freshly cut, organically grown aloe vera leaves with no acrylates or crosspolymers, ensuring clean and natural skin and hair care.
HYDRATING & SOOTHING – Delivers refreshing, cooling comfort after sun exposure or shaving, leaving skin feeling soft, calm, and revitalised.
FAST-ABSORBING, NON-STICKY FORMULA – Lightweight texture sinks in quickly with no greasy residue, making it ideal as a daily moisturiser or pre-makeup base.
MULTI-PURPOSE BEAUTY ESSENTIAL – Perfect as an after-sun gel, daily moisturiser, scalp conditioner, pre- or post-shave gel, or leave-in hair treatment for a healthy-looking finish.
SUITABLE FOR ALL SKIN TYPES – Gentle, fragrance-free, and vegan-friendly, making it suitable for sensitive skin and the whole family.
description: Product description Discover the natural touch of Ammuri Organic Aloe Vera Gel – Big 300 ml Value Size Experience the refreshing hydration of 100 % pure, organic aloe vera, carefully extracted from freshly cut leaves. Our fast-absorbing, non-sticky gel is ideal for all skin and hair types, making it a versatile addition to your daily self-care routine. Why You’ll Love It Pure & Organic – Made from high-quality organic aloe vera with no acrylates or crosspolymers. Hydrating & Soothing – Delivers a cooling sensation, leaving skin feeling soft, refreshed, and revitalised. Fast-Absorbing & Non-Sticky – Lightweight texture absorbs quickly without residue. Multi-Purpose Care – Perfect as a daily face and body moisturiser, after-sun cooling gel, pre- or post-shave gel, or scalp conditioner. For All Skin Types – Gentle, fragrance-free formula suitable for sensitive skin. Ingredients aloe vera, citric acid, potassium sorbate, ascorbic acid, sodium hyalauronate Directions Apply a small amount of gel to clean, dry skin or hair and gently massage until absorbed. Use daily as a face and body moisturiser, soothing after sun care, or as a lightweight hair and scalp treatment Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid direct contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use and consult a doctor. Keep out of reach of children. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. See more

product_details_tab_data.Active Ingredients: These are all natural antioxidants used to preserve this gel namely citric acid, potassium sorbate, ascorbic acid (vitamin C) and sodium hyalauronate - all of which are safe, unlike the additions made to so many other brands and for this reason we advise to keep this product refrigerated once opened.
